notableEvents.label: Seiya Suzuki GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki grounds into a double play, shortstop Jeremy Peña to first baseman Christian Walker. Nico Hoerner out at 2nd. Seiya Suzuki out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Amaya GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Amaya grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to second baseman Braden Shewmake to first baseman Christian Walker. Moisés Ballesteros out at 2nd. Miguel Amaya out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Ramírez grounds out, second baseman Brice Matthews to first baseman Christian Walker.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Colin Rea picks off Cam Smith at 1st on throw to first baseman Michael Busch.

notableEvents.label: Zach Dezenzo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Zach Dezenzo lines out sharply to left fielder Kevin Alcántara.
